title: Cheers for Miss Bishop
writer: Bess Streeter Aldrich, Stephen Vincent Benet, Adelaide Heilbron
actors: Martha Scott, William Gargan, Edmund Gwenn
plot: Dedicated Midwestern teacher Ella Bishop is distressed when her fiancé runs off with her vixenish cousin Amy. After Amy dies in childbirth, Ella is left to care for Amy's daughter Hope.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 1 nomination total
